_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Demonstrate to executive stakeholders how data and analytics initiatives address agency challenges.
reference_document_element_description: Execute analytical requests from business stakeholders, including data extraction, transformation, analysis, and delivery of findings with documented methodology.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-002 (LS, cosine: 0.585), DG-T-012 (DG, cosine: 0.582).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.2/10 (raw 0.624). Shared vocabulary: [data, stakeholders]. DCWF-only terms [address, agency, analytics, challenges, demonstrate, executive] vs WIDAI-only terms [analysis, analytical, business, delivery, documented, execute] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.886 (P=0.892, R=0.880). Balanced P/R — the 12-word DCWF element and 18-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.2%). "Demonstrate to executive stakeholders how data and analytics initiatives address" and "Execute analytical requests from business stakeholders, including data extractio" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.622 ≈ STS 0.624 (gap 0.002). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data, stakeholders] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.1%. Shared tokens: [data, stakeholders]. DCWF-only: [address, agency, analytics, challenges, demonstrate, executive]. WIDAI-only: [analysis, analytical, business, delivery, documented, execute].
